scenarios.title: completes a credit-card payment and lands on the order-confirmation page @positive
scenarios.userAction: User updates the second cart item quantity to 3, clicks Checkout, fills card details on the payment form, and clicks Pay Now.
expectedAssertions: Order confirmed heading is visible on the confirmation page
Summary total element contains a '$' currency symbol

scenarios.title: checkout CTA is disabled when all cart items have been removed @negative
scenarios.userAction: User removes all items from the cart one-by-one using the remove button on each row.
expectedAssertions: Empty-cart banner is visible after all items are removed
Checkout CTA is disabled (HTML disabled attribute or aria-disabled='true')

locatorTable.notes: CSS class only; no role or ARIA evidence. Requires data-testid='cart-row' from FE or reviewer DOM confirmation. See Q4.
Index eq(1) replaced with product-name filter; spinbutton role assumed for type=number input. See Q4, Q5.
cy.contains text match; assuming <button> — could be <a>. See Q6.
Anchored regex avoids heading/breadcrumb match. Could be <a>. See Q7.
name='card' does not reveal visible label text. If Stripe/Adyen iframe: needs frameLocator. See Q8.
name='exp' is abbreviated; visible label text unknown. Iframe caveat same as card input. See Q8.
CVC/CVV is standard payment terminology; reasonable label assumption. Iframe caveat same as card input. See Q8.
CSS class .pay-now implies accessible name 'Pay now'; button tag confirms role. See Q8.
CSS class only. Requires data-testid='summary-total' or role confirmation from reviewer. See Q9.

Success-page text assumed to be a heading element. Could be

or

. See pin 8.
CSS class .remove-btn; accessible name unknown. May be icon-only button. See Q11.
CSS class only. Could be role=alert, role=status, or no semantic role. See Q10.
Assert toBeDisabled() directly on the button instead of checking CSS class on parent. See Q7.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q4 unresolved: cart-row testid absent, CSS fallback
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add data-testid='cart-row' to each row element, OR confirm semantic role (e.g. role=row in a <table> layout).

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Quantity input for the second cart row
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: qty input label unknown, fragile nth fallback if filter not available
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm quantity input is type=number and supply the second row's product name for the filter. If no stable name, FE should add data-testid='qty-input' scoped inside data-testid='cart-row'.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q6 unresolved: Update cart element role not confirmed — assumed <button>
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect HTML; if <a>, switch to getByRole('link', { name: /update cart/i }).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q7 unresolved: Checkout CTA role and disabled mechanism not confirmed — assumed <button disabled>
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If element is <a aria-disabled='true'>, switch to getByRole('link') and assert toHaveAttribute('aria-disabled','true') instead of toBeDisabled().

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q8 unresolved: card input label text and iframe nesting unknown
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If payment form is inside an iframe (Stripe/Adyen/Braintree), replace with page.frameLocator('iframe[title*="card" i]').getByRole('textbox', { name: /card number/i }).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q8 unresolved: expiry input label text unknown
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm visible label text; if iframed, apply the same frameLocator pattern as pin 5.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q9 unresolved: summary-total testid absent, CSS fallback used
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE to add data-testid='summary-total'; or confirm role (e.g. role=cell in a totals table) for semantic targeting.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q10b unresolved: order-confirmed element role assumed heading (<h1>–<h6>)
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If element is not a heading, use page.getByText(/order confirmed/i) instead.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q11 unresolved: remove button accessible name unknown — assumed visible text or aria-label 'Remove'
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If icon-only button, request FE adds aria-label='Remove'; otherwise confirm accessible name text.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q10 unresolved: empty-cart-banner ARIA role not confirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm role='status' or role='alert'; if no semantic role, request data-testid='empty-cart-banner' from FE.
